title: Inaccessible station or facility
header: I am writing to complain about an inaccessible facility I encountered at {{location}} on {{date}}, while travelling with {{operator}}.
legalParagraph: Operators and station facility owners must make reasonable adjustments to allow disabled passengers to access services on a fair basis, as required by the Equality Act 2010. For rail, the Accessible Travel Policy framework (regulated by the ORR) requires accessible alternatives to be provided when fixed infrastructure cannot be used; for airports, EU Regulation 1107/2006 (as retained in UK law) requires accessible facilities and assistance.
ask: I would like a written explanation of why the facility was inaccessible at the time, the corrective steps you will take, the timeline for those corrections, and confirmation of the alternative arrangements available to me and others on future visits. Please respond within 20 working days.
